Sandbox_IsThriller_Range_tooltip: The Thriller or myBGM stage can only trigger if there are enough zombies within this distance and the player is in combat (targeted or actively attacking). Zombie movement speed within the area will also be rerolled during the Thriller stage.
Sandbox_IsThriller_SprintChance_tooltip: The probability of zombies becoming sprinters upon entering the stage radius. If they fail the roll and are shamblers, they will be upgraded to fast shamblers.
Sandbox_IsThriller_MaxZombies_tooltip: During the music intro, the maximum number of extra background zombies spawned per minute just outside the player's vision (random between 2 and this value, spawning from the edge of the gathering radius). These extras have a chance to join the backup dancers.
Sandbox_IsThriller_MaxDancer_tooltip: The number of backup dancers appearing alongside MJ when the Thriller stage begins. Set to 0 for a random number between 2 and 5. Note: Backup dancers have higher stats than normal zombies and a healing mechanic. They will heal and enter counter-attack mode when hit during the performance. Proceed with caution.
Sandbox_IsThriller_MaxFinal_tooltip: The total number of rioting fans added around the stage when MJ is killed. Minimum: 10, Maximum: 300. Rioting fan zombies are buffed, with a high chance of being sprinters and a low chance of being super sprinters. Proceed with caution.
Sandbox_IsThriller_EventChance_tooltip: The probability of triggering the Thriller stage every in-game minute when zombies are nearby. The chance doubles at night. 1 = 0.1% chance. Since this is calculated per minute, it is highly recommended to keep the value low to avoid overly frequent triggers.
Sandbox_IsThriller_EventCooldown_tooltip: After a Thriller event starts and successfully concludes, you must wait this many in-game hours before the next one can trigger.
Sandbox_IsThriller_MaxWave_tooltip: How many songs will play during a single Thriller stage. Once this number is reached, the stage fades out. The maximum number of extra zombie spawn waves during the intro is twice the song count. Please adjust to balance the extra zombie cap and the max waves.
Sandbox_IsThriller_MusicOptionsDivider_t: Multiple tracks can be selected; a random track from the selection will play when the Thriller event triggers. This option acts only as a divider and has no effect. If left empty, it defaults to the full song. If a track expansion mod is installed, they will automatically be added to the combat playlist.
Sandbox_IsThriller_JustBeatIt_tooltip: Plays Beat It when MJ appears.
Sandbox_IsThriller_JustSmoothCriminal_to: Plays Smooth Criminal when MJ appears.
Sandbox_IsThriller_NoBodyCanBeatMeInBGM: Nobody Can Beat Me In My BGM
Sandbox_IsThriller_NoBodyCanBeatMeInBGM_: Changes the mod's operation mode. Instead of triggering the special zombie horde event, entering combat will simply play a random or selected MJ song and grant the player an extra buff lasting 15 in-game minutes.
